name: Bill Cosby
blurb: He holds the record for the most Grammy Awards for Best Comedy Album with seven wins, and his 1983 concert film Bill Cosby: Himself is widely cited among the greatest stand-up films.
bio: Bill Cosby is an American comedian and actor who rose to fame in the 1960s with a conversational, observational stand-up style built on warm childhood and family anecdotes rather than topical or racial material. He holds the record for the most Grammy Awards for Best Comedy Album with seven wins, and his 1983 concert film Bill Cosby: Himself is widely cited among the greatest stand-up films. His career and reputation collapsed after numerous sexual assault allegations beginning in 2014.

timeline.ev: Releases debut comedy album Bill Cosby Is a Very Funny Fellow...Right!
Stars in I Spy, becoming first Black actor to win a lead-drama Emmy
Releases concert film Bill Cosby: Himself
Convicted of aggravated sexual assault and imprisoned
Conviction vacated by the Supreme Court of Pennsylvania on due-process grounds

accolades: Seven Grammy Awards for Best Comedy Album (record holder)
Three consecutive Primetime Emmy Awards for I Spy
Kennedy Center Mark Twain Prize for American Humor (2009)
